Model Comparison

Below is a table comparing different model variants and their configurations.

Size Patch Size Resolution Framework A Framework B
Base (86M) 32 256 org/model-base-patch32-256 org/model-base-patch32-256-b
Base (86M) 16 256 org/model-base-patch16-256 org/model-base-patch16-256-b
Base (86M) 16 512 org/model-base-patch16-512 org/model-base-patch16-512-b
Large (400M) 16 256 org/model-large-patch16-256 org/model-large-patch16-256-b
Large (400M) 16 384 org/model-large-patch16-384 org/model-large-patch16-384-b
SO400M (400M) 16 256 org/model-so400m-patch16-256 org/model-so400m-patch16-256-b
SO400M (400M) 14 384 org/model-so400m-patch14-384 org/model-so400m-patch14-384-b
SO400M (400M) 14 768 org/model-so400m-patch14-768 org/model-so400m-patch14-768-b

Each model variant is optimized for different use cases depending on resolution and patch size.
